excluded: acceptance of credit attestation or exact live-run approval
creation of a runnable live-submit command
a noisy-hardware robustness or auditability conclusion
supported: cost-constrained comparison of full, reduced-shot, scout, and strong-lane hardware scopes
explicit distinction between claim-capable and scouting-only scope reductions
pre-attestation recommendation to avoid asking the user to approve a likely-over-budget full run

next_gate: Preregister the selected reduced-scope interpretation boundary before asking for credit attestation. Recommended default is all_lanes_half_shots_2048; use scout_512 only for operational smoke testing.
objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap-RoPE's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.

review_items.description: Reduced scope review requires the Stage188 replacement simulation to be positive.
Stage196 must establish the full run cost posture before selecting a reduced scope.
The recommended reduced scope preserves all lanes/families/rows while reducing shot count, but must be preregistered before any attestation.

recommended_scope.description: All selected IBM lanes and families, all 16 rows, 2048 shots per row.
recommended_scope.rationale: Preserves coverage but halves shot resolution; weakest simulated positional margin falls near 2.6 shot quanta.

review_items.description: Only the full 4096-shot plan directly inherits the Stage188 evidentiary thresholds; reduced plans need a preregistered lower-precision interpretation boundary.

scope_options.description: All selected IBM lanes, all five families, all 16 rows, 4096 shots per row.
scope_options.rationale: Preserves both IBM seeds, both circuit templates, all comparators, full row coverage, and original Stage188 shot resolution.

scope_options.description: All selected IBM lanes and families, all 16 rows, 2048 shots per row.
scope_options.rationale: Preserves coverage but halves shot resolution; weakest simulated positional margin falls near 2.6 shot quanta.

scope_options.description: All selected IBM lanes and families, all 16 rows, 512 shots per row.
scope_options.rationale: Preserves structure but weakens shot resolution too much for the weakest Stage188 margin; useful only to test operational viability and gross direction.

scope_options.description: Only seed577 product and CX lanes, all five families, all 16 rows, 4096 shots per row.
scope_options.rationale: Keeps strongest seed and both templates but drops independent seed replication; useful for de-risking before full run, not final evidence.
